title: PhysicalAsset
description: A specific physical resource reachable through a Connector: a table, bucket prefix, Kafka topic, or API endpoint.

specVersion.description: Spec version of this document, e.g. "2.0.0".

assetKind.description: The type of physical resource: objectStore, rdbms, stream, file, api, or lakehouse.

connectorId.description: URN of the Connector used to reach this asset. Pattern: urn:srcos:connector:<id>

location.description: The resource locator within the connector (e.g. S3 URI, table name, Kafka topic).

identification.description: Cloud-vendor identification metadata: vendor, account, region, and resource ID.
